posts.title: 🎓 Senior Information · 4/16/26
posts.summary: Josten's will be on campus during lunch only on April 28 to take the last cap and gown orders for $65. Seniors who missed April 2 pickup must go to the administration office.
posts.author: Lisa Walters
posts.body:
Good morning!

Josten's will be on campus DURING LUNCH ONLY on April 28, to take the last of the cap and gown orders. They are $65. You can also go to jostens.com to put in your order. If you ordered your cap and gown, but weren't here to pick it up on April 2, please go to the administration office to pick it up. Also — don't forget — all seniors must have a walking partner.

posts.title: 📝 CAASPP State Testing for All Juniors Begins Tomorrow
posts.summary: CAASPP state testing for all 11th grade juniors begins tomorrow, April 16. Students should sleep well, arrive on time, and bring a fully charged school-issued tablet.
posts.author: Marnie Dice
posts.body:
Dear Students, Staff, and Families,

This is a reminder that CAASPP state testing for all juniors begins tomorrow. Please help set students up for success by making sure they:

  • Get a good night's sleep
  • Arrive on time
  • Bring their fully charged school-issued tablet

We encourage all students to take the CAASPP seriously and do their best. While these assessments represent only one measure of student achievement, they provide valuable information about how our students are progressing.

posts.title: 🎓 Get Ahead This Summer! Allan Hancock Enrollment Workshop
posts.summary: PVHS is hosting a workshop on Monday April 13 during lunch to walk students through Allan Hancock College summer registration. Earn college credit early or explore a new subject.
posts.author: Israel Hernandez
posts.body:
🚀 Summer College Credits: Allan Hancock Enrollment Workshop!

Help your student get ahead this summer! We are hosting a dedicated workshop to walk students through the Allan Hancock College summer registration process. Whether they want to earn college credit early or explore a new subject, this is the perfect time to start.

The Details

  • 📅 When: Monday, April 13
  • 🕐 Time: During Lunch
  • 📍 Where: See campus announcements for location

posts.title: 🎤 Please Join PVHS & TKJHS for a Motivational Keynote from Erica Alfaro — 4/13/26 @ 6PM in the PVHS Library
posts.summary: Motivational speaker Erica Alfaro presents at PVHS on Monday 4/13/26 at 6pm in the PVHS Library. She is an award-winning author and educational advocate.
posts.author: Paul Robinson
posts.body:
Motivational speaker Erica Alfaro will be presenting at PVHS on Monday 4/13/26 at 6pm in the PVHS Library.

PVHS, in partnership with TKJHS, is very excited to offer our School Community a chance to hear an inspirational message from Erica Alfaro. Erica is an award-winning author, keynote speaker, and educational advocate. In 2019, Erica's graduation pictures went viral and made headlines around the world.

posts.title: 📬 PVHS Weekly Newsletter 4/2/2026
posts.summary: PVHS weekly newsletter for April 2, 2026. Spring Break runs Friday 4/3 through Sunday 4/12 with return on Monday 4/13.
posts.author: Araceli Mandujano-Padilla
posts.body:
Hello Panthers!

Welcome to this week's edition of the Pioneer Valley Newsletter! We're excited to share the latest happenings and updates from our school community to keep you informed and engaged.

Paul R. Robinson, Ph.D. — Principal

Spring Break: There will be no classes from Friday 4/3/26 to Monday 4/13/26. We return on Monday 4/13/26. Please encourage your student to rest, recharge, and come back ready to finish the year strong.

posts.title: 🎓 Meet with an Allan Hancock College Counselor at PVHS — Tuesday, April 21st
posts.summary: AHC Counselor visits PVHS on Tuesday April 21st. 12th graders must meet with a counselor to get their First Semester Plan before registering for May classes.
posts.author: Melani Mederos
posts.body:
Hey Panthers!

If you're planning on attending Allan Hancock College in the fall, and you haven't met with an AHC Counselor yet, scan the QR code below to reserve your appointment time for Tuesday, April 21st.

You must meet with an AHC Counselor to get your "First Semester Plan" so you can register for classes in May!

Questions? Please see your PVHS Counselor, Mr. Hernandez in the library, or Mrs. Mederos.

posts.title: 🚨 Campus Update
posts.summary: A PVHS student had a medical emergency during class today around noon and was transported by ambulance. Counseling services are available to all students.
posts.author: Paul Robinson
posts.body:
Good Afternoon PV School Community,

About noon today, a male PVHS student had a medical emergency during class. A school nurse immediately responded to the classroom and the student was transported by ambulance to the hospital for followup. Counseling services are always made available during these types of concerning situations.

Respectfully,
Paul Robinson, Principal

posts.title: 🏫 Spring Fair, Minimum Day, & Important Senior Updates! Tomorrow 4/2
posts.summary: Tomorrow 4/2 is an action-packed day with a minimum day schedule and spring fair before Spring Break begins.
posts.author: Jeffrey Hromadka
posts.body:
Dear Families and Students,

We have an action-packed day tomorrow as we head into our Spring Break! Please review the following updates regarding tomorrow's schedule and upcoming events.

  • Minimum Day Schedule — shortened periods for all students
  • Spring Fair — join us for food, fun, and community on campus
